items.title: Solana: How $30B in staked SOL unlocks new DeFi liquidity
items.whyYouShouldCare: $30 billion in staked SOL unlocks new DeFi liquidity opportunities for Solana users and developers.

items.title: Zora moves onto Solana with 'attention markets' for trading internet trends
